nasb.text: He who is steadfast in righteousness will attain to life, And he who pursues evil will bring about his own death.

esv.text: Whoever is steadfast in righteousness will live, but he who pursues evil will die.

cnv.text: 恆心行義的必得生命； 追隨邪惡的必致死亡。

ccb.text: 坚持行义，必得生命； 追逐罪恶，终必灭亡。

csbs.text: 真正行义的，必得生命； 追求恶事的，必致死亡。
